LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS-DEFENDANT SECURICORP DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER OVERRULED IN PART AND SUSTAINED IN PART. DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO FIRST AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CONTRACTUAL INDEMNITY. CROSS-COMPLAINANT MUST EITHER ATTACH A COPY OF THE WRITTEN CONTRACT OR SPECIFICALLY PLEAD ITS TERMS. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: JOSEPH VICKSTEIN, CSR #4780

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS-DEFENDANT SECURICORP DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEMURRER OVERRULED IN PART AND SUSTAINED IN PART. DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO FIRST AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR CONTRACTUAL INDEMNITY. CROSS-COMPLAINANT MUST EITHER ATTACH A COPY OF THE WRITTEN CONTRACT OR SPECIFICALLY PLEAD ITS TERMS. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR # 4780
